name: Five Iron Golf
about: Five Iron Golf Cleveland Downtown is an indoor golf venue offering high-tech simulator play, professional instruction, and social event hosting. The facility features Trackman-equipped bays, allowing players to experience over 200 virtual golf courses, including PGA Tour venues like Pebble Beach. The venue combines golf simulation with a full-service bar and lounge, creating an accessible, no-dress-code environment suitable for golfers of all skill levels. It also provides multisport simulations for soccer, hockey, and football, along with amenities like a pro shop and custom club fitting services, making it a versatile destination for both practice and entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman technology provides accurate ball flight and swing data
Access to 200+ virtual courses, including iconic PGA Tour venues
Full-service bar and chef-inspired menu for a complete entertainment experience
Multisport simulators extend entertainment beyond golf
Professional coaching and custom club fitting available on-site
Flexible membership options with 90 minutes of daily free play

food_and_drink.notes: Full chef-inspired menu available, including wings, pizzas, and appetizers
Full-service bar with drink packages and specials available

simulator_hardware.notes: High-speed cameras and launch monitors provide detailed ball and club tracking data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available at the venue, but you are welcome to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers a full menu and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A standard 18-hole round typically takes 1-2 hours depending on simulator usage and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Five Iron Golf offers kids' parties and junior clinics, making it suitable for families.
